settings.title: Friendly Support

settings.question: Do you sell original products?
settings.answer: Yes — we deal only in 100% genuine, branded mobile phones and accessories.

settings.question: Do you offer delivery across Pakistan?
settings.answer: Yes, we deliver across Karachi and all of Pakistan. Message us on WhatsApp for delivery details.

settings.question: How can I place an order?
settings.answer: Order online through the website, or contact us on WhatsApp at 0315-2972723 / 0348-2532992.

settings.question: Do accessories come with warranty?
settings.answer: Branded products carry manufacturer warranty where applicable. Ask us about a specific product.

settings.heading: Unlock Free Delivery on Orders Over Rs. 5,000
settings.text: Shop your favourite mobiles and accessories and get them delivered to your doorstep — free.
